description: Direct dependencies are recent, but pinned transitive dependencies are vulnerable and incompatible
review_checklist: Audit constraints.txt for pinned transitive versions
Identify version mismatch with direct dependency requirements

ground_truth.description: Pinned pydantic==1.10.7 conflicts with FastAPI 0.110.0 which requires pydantic>=2.0. The constraint will either fail to resolve or downgrade FastAPI silently. Direct vs transitive constraint mismatch.
starlette 0.36.0 has CVE-2024-47874 (multipart DoS) — patched in 0.40.0. Direct dependency FastAPI 0.110 pulls starlette transitively; this constraint pins it to a vulnerable version.
anyio 3.7.1 — anyio 4.x is required for asyncio.timeout compatibility with Python 3.11+ and has performance fixes. Pinning to 3.x in a constraints file forces older code paths.
greenlet 2.0.0 has multiple memory-corruption issues fixed in 3.0.x. Required by sqlalchemy for its async support.
